courses.name: Mathematics A
courses.description: Core mathematics course focused on functions, algebra, statistics, and problem solving.

assignments.name: Linear Functions
assignments.description: Solve exercises about linear functions, slope, and intersections.

submissions.comment: I finished all exercises and added notes for the graph questions.
submissions.feedback: Good work. Check your explanation of slope in exercise 4.

submissions.comment: The last two questions were difficult, but I tried to show my process.
submissions.feedback: Acceptable solution. Add more intermediate steps next time.

submissions.comment: Submitted late due to technical issues.
submissions.feedback: Late submission. Some calculations are correct, but explanations are missing.

assignments.name: Descriptive Statistics
assignments.description: Calculate mean, median, variance, and standard deviation from sample data.

submissions.feedback: Very clear calculations and good interpretation.

submissions.comment: I was unsure about variance but included my calculations.

assignments.name: Exam Preparation Set
assignments.description: Mixed exam-style questions covering previous topics.

announcements.name: Welcome to Mathematics A
announcements.content: Welcome to the course. The first assignment is available under assignments.

announcements.name: Remember calculator rules
announcements.content: Bring your approved calculator to class on Thursday. We will use it for statistics exercises.

announcements.name: Extra help session
announcements.content: There will be an optional help session after class for students who want extra practice.

courses.name: Software Development
courses.description: Backend and frontend development using C#, ASP.NET Core, React, and TypeScript.

assignments.name: Build a REST API
assignments.description: Create a small ASP.NET Core API with CRUD endpoints and DTOs.

submissions.comment: API includes controllers, services, and DTOs.
submissions.feedback: Strong structure and good separation of concerns.

submissions.comment: CRUD works, but validation is still basic.
submissions.feedback: Good result. Add more validation and error handling.

submissions.comment: I had trouble with AutoMapper but got the endpoints working.

assignments.name: React Course Dashboard
assignments.description: Create a React dashboard that displays courses, assignments, and announcements.

submissions.comment: Dashboard uses reusable components and TanStack Query.
submissions.feedback: Good component structure. Improve loading and error states.

submissions.comment: The layout is done, but some API calls are mocked.

assignments.name: Service Layer Testing
assignments.description: Write unit tests for service methods using xUnit and mocked dependencies.

announcements.name: Project groups
announcements.content: Project groups should be registered before Friday.

announcements.name: API review
announcements.content: Next session will focus on REST API design, controller responsibilities, and service boundaries.

announcements.name: Frontend checkpoint
announcements.content: Bring your current React dashboard to class for feedback.

courses.name: Databases for Developers
courses.description: Relational database design, SQL, Entity Framework Core, and data modelling.

assignments.name: ER Model Design
assignments.description: Design an ER model for a school management system.

submissions.comment: ER diagram includes users, courses, assignments, and submissions.
submissions.feedback: Good model. Consider whether files need a separate relation.
Very clear design with good normalization.

submissions.comment: I submitted the first version of the diagram.

assignments.name: SQL Query Exercises
assignments.description: Write SQL queries using joins, grouping, filtering, and ordering.

submissions.comment: All queries are included with comments.
I had issues with group by but completed most queries.
submissions.feedback: Queries mostly work. Review aggregate functions.

assignments.name: Entity Framework Core Mapping
assignments.description: Create entity classes and configure relationships with EF Core.

announcements.name: Database tools
announcements.content: Install MySQL Workbench or another database client before the next lesson.

announcements.name: ER model feedback
announcements.content: Feedback for the ER model assignment will be added during the week.

announcements.name: SQL practice
announcements.content: Additional SQL practice questions have been added to the course materials.

courses.name: System Integration
courses.description: Integration patterns, APIs, asynchronous communication, and real-time messaging.

assignments.name: API Contract Documentation
assignments.description: Document an API contract using Swagger/OpenAPI principles.

submissions.comment: Swagger screenshots and endpoint descriptions included.
submissions.feedback: Good overview. Add more detail about request validation.

submissions.comment: Focused on response DTOs and status codes.

assignments.name: Real-time Chat Prototype
assignments.description: Build a small real-time chat prototype using WebSockets or SignalR.

submissions.comment: SignalR hub and simple frontend client are included.
submissions.feedback: Strong implementation and good explanation of groups.

submissions.comment: Basic WebSocket connection works, but messages are not persisted yet.

assignments.name: Integration Case Study
assignments.description: Analyze an integration scenario and propose a technical solution.

announcements.name: SignalR introduction
announcements.content: This week we introduce real-time communication using SignalR.

announcements.name: Integration diagrams
announcements.content: Remember to include sequence diagrams in your integration case study.

announcements.name: Prototype review
announcements.content: We will review chat prototypes in the next session.
